bug.description: missing timeout handling on a protocol wait causing indefinite hang

prompt:
There is a missing timeout handling on a protocol wait causing indefinite hang downstream of function do_write_op_tlv_dummy_read in the subsys/net/lib subsystem.
The function is located at subsys/net/lib/lwm2m/lwm2m_rw_oma_tlv.c:817.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
